provenance_tiers.A: direct mobility measurement with composition, temperature, density and method retained
provenance_tiers.B: model-paper benchmark input with explicit device context
provenance_tiers.C: theoretical mobility calculation requiring its own scattering and compensation inputs

direct_electron_measurements.title: Helicons and nonresonant cyclotron absorption in semiconductors. II. Hg1-xCdxTe
direct_electron_measurements.accepted_use: measured 77 K electron-mobility anchors retaining specimen density and method
direct_electron_measurements.prohibited_use: interpolating a universal composition-only mobility law

p_type_variable_field_source.finding: electron and hole extraction is strongly regime dependent; high electron-to-hole mobility ratio, impurity-band conduction and multiple hole populations complicate interpretation

model_conditioned_benchmark.status: cross-checked model input, not direct universal material measurement
model_conditioned_benchmark.accepted_use: dimensionless detector benchmark and sensitivity center
model_conditioned_benchmark.prohibited_use: predictive material closure without specimen evidence

theoretical_source_correction.title: Theoretical calculation of electron mobility in HgCdTe
theoretical_source_correction.accepted_use: future theory comparison after equation-level audit

required_before_material_closure: source-exact Scott relation and specimen domain
primary 77 K hole-mobility measurements for detector-relevant compositions
explicit dependence on carrier density, compensation and processing
comparison against project Hall data when available
